title: Wikstroemia aurantiaca
taxonomy: Wikstroemia aurantiaca belongs to the family Thymelaeaceae, a group of flowering plants commonly known as the daphne or thymelaeaceous family. This plant is a part of the genus Wikstroemia, which is native to East Asia. The classification of Wikstroemia aurantiaca is further divided into the kingdom Plantae. As a flowering plant, it is a part of the angiosperm category. The specific classification of Wikstroemia aurantiaca is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, order Malvales, family Thymelaeaceae, genus Wikstroemia, species W. aurantiaca.
